cxu_object.claim: Trading fees are the primary destroyer of returns on Hyperliquid ETH perpetuals requiring a minimum edge of thirteen dollars per round-trip trade to achieve profitability

supporting_contexts.text: On Hyperliquid: minimum profitable trade needs ~$2.90 move (0.14%). Full round-trip fee on $15,000 position: ~$13. Observed catastrophe: $64 in fees paid on only $5 gross profit resulting in negative fifty-nine dollars net.

Every trade costs approximately one dollar. Only trade when the setup is clear. Fee drag by strategy: Signal Consensus $2-6/day (2-3 trades), Trend Following $3-8/day (3-8 trades), Edge Detection $15-40/day (15-25 trades), Scalp Bands $20-60/day (20-30 trades).

hierarchy.document_title: AgDel Trading Wiki — One Week Intensive Results

version.change_description: Initial axiom extracted from one week of live trading on Hyperliquid ETH perpetuals
